# File Formats[¶](#file-formats "Link to this heading")

The modules described in this chapter parse various miscellaneous file formats
that aren’t markup languages and are not related to e-mail.

* [`csv` — CSV File Reading and Writing](csv.html)
  + [Module Contents](csv.html#module-contents)
  + [Dialects and Formatting Parameters](csv.html#dialects-and-formatting-parameters)
  + [Reader Objects](csv.html#reader-objects)
  + [Writer Objects](csv.html#writer-objects)
  + [Examples](csv.html#examples)
* [`configparser` — Configuration file parser](configparser.html)
  + [Quick Start](configparser.html#quick-start)
  + [Supported Datatypes](configparser.html#supported-datatypes)
  + [Fallback Values](configparser.html#fallback-values)
  + [Supported INI File Structure](configparser.html#supported-ini-file-structure)
  + [Unnamed Sections](configparser.html#unnamed-sections)
  + [Interpolation of values](configparser.html#interpolation-of-values)
  + [Mapping Protocol Access](configparser.html#mapping-protocol-access)
  + [Customizing Parser Behaviour](configparser.html#customizing-parser-behaviour)
  + [Legacy API Examples](configparser.html#legacy-api-examples)
  + [ConfigParser Objects](configparser.html#configparser-objects)
  + [RawConfigParser Objects](configparser.html#rawconfigparser-objects)
  + [Exceptions](configparser.html#exceptions)
* [`tomllib` — Parse TOML files](tomllib.html)
  + [Examples](tomllib.html#examples)
  + [Conversion Table](tomllib.html#conversion-table)
* [`netrc` — netrc file processing](netrc.html)
  + [netrc Objects](netrc.html#netrc-objects)
* [`plistlib` — Generate and parse Apple `.plist` files](plistlib.html)
  + [Examples](plistlib.html#examples)
